title: おかわりトレーニング

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa! Use your common sense! When it
comes down to it, racing's all about stamina.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: "C-common sense"?! Never did I imagine I'd hear those words passing through your lips!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, you see, we wanted to do some extra
training. But...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
How 'bout this? We get this trainer to decide
which of our three training plans we should go
with!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So they want me to decide... It's true that I have some time, and this could be helpful to in the long run.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What better way to conquer the seven seas than
by running laps? Who needs a treasure map when
your stamina will see you to the goal?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
No, it's gotta be a speed run! When you floor it
and your engines are running at full speed, you
get this maaaajor energy boost, like
VROOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I propose an all-you-can-eat marathon! Post-training meals are just as important as the training itself! Heck, I think eating ought to count as training!
choice_data_list: A speed run sounds like a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I propose an all-you-can-eat marathon! Post-training meals are just as important as the training itself! Heck, I think eating ought to count as training!
choice_data_list: A speed run sounds like a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you have a point. However... Do keep in
mind that the suggestion is coming from someone
who regularly ignores the bounds of common
sense.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sure it'll be fine! She doesn't look like she's
joking or playing around with us. Maybe this is
the secret behind Gold Ship's strength!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Um. Where are we?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Reliable sources say there are Horsegirl sightings on
this mountain. You know, unidentified mysterious
animals! Let's catch us one and make some
ka-ching ka-ching!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh for goodness' sake!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What was supposed to be some laps around a racecourse becomes a trek up a mountain. However, it did serve as a kind of training.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Woo! You made the right choice! Now, let's
decide the distance with rock-paper-scissors!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...With so many people here, wouldn't it make
more sense to cast a vote?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begins the impromptu speed race, which
quickly turns into an impressive dead heat
between the contenders.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, this really gets your blood pumping. I feel
so warm and toasty!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Right?! Nothing like lighting a fire under yourself
to get you working up a sweat! How 'bout we run
the Derby length next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team spends the rest of the afternoon racing
to their hearts' content.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yay! It's a good thing I saved these
all-you-can-eat dessert vouchers!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you have quite the pile of them there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I... I suppose if that is what the majority has decided, it would be impolite of me not to participate.

text_block_list.name: Spe & McQueen
text_block_list.text: Mmm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team takes a breather and deepens their
bond over a smorgasbord of delightful sweets!
